criteria_verification.criterion_text: When `async_subagents=None`: no async subagents wired; the supervisor's tool catalogue does **not** include the five `AsyncSubAgentMiddleware` operational tools (scenario: *Building the supervisor without the async-subagents argument preserves existing behaviour*).
criteria_verification.evidence: build_supervisor passes subagents=list(async_subagents) if async_subagents else [] to create_deep_agent — an empty list keeps AsyncSubAgentMiddleware out of the middleware stack so its five tools are not injected. Asserted by TestAC002NoAsyncSubagentsByDefault.test_subagents_kwarg_is_empty_list_when_none and test_compiled_graph_omits_async_middleware_tools (the latter walks the realised graph nodes and asserts the intersection with {start,check,update,cancel,list}_async_task[s] is empty).
criteria_verification.notes: build_supervisor passes subagents=list(async_subagents) if async_subagents else [] to create_deep_agent — an empty list keeps AsyncSubAgentMiddleware out of the middleware stack so its five tools are not injected. Asserted by TestAC002NoAsyncSubagentsByDefault.test_subagents_kwarg_is_empty_list_when_none and test_compiled_graph_omits_async_middleware_tools (the latter walks the realised graph nodes and asserts the intersection with {start,check,update,cancel,list}_async_task[s] is empty).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: When `async_subagents=[<jarvis-reasoner>]`: `AsyncSubAgentMiddleware` auto-injects `start_async_task`, `check_async_task`, `update_async_task`, `cancel_async_task`, `list_async_tasks` into the supervisor's tool catalogue (scenario: *Wiring the async subagent injects the five middleware operational tools*).
criteria_verification.evidence: When async_subagents is non-empty it is forwarded verbatim as subagents=list(async_subagents) to create_deep_agent, which causes deepagents.graph to append AsyncSubAgentMiddleware(async_subagents=…) — the middleware then registers all five operational tools. Asserted by TestAC003AsyncSubagentInjectsMiddlewareTools.test_subagents_kwarg_carries_supplied_async_specs (kwargs check) and test_compiled_graph_exposes_five_middleware_tools (real-graph introspection — asserts ASYNC_MIDDLEWARE_TOOL_NAMES ⊆ wired).

Asserted by TestAC003AsyncSubagentInjectsMiddlewareTools.test_subagents_kwarg_carries_supplied_async_specs (kwargs check) and test_compiled_graph_exposes_five_middleware_tools (real-graph introspection — asserts ASYNC_MIDDLEWARE_TOOL_NAMES ⊆ wired).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: When `ambient_tool_factory=None`: ambient/learning paths fall back to `assemble_tool_list(..., include_frontier=False)` — the attended tool list minus `escalate_to_frontier` (scenario: *Not configuring an ambient tool factory falls back to the attended tools without frontier*).
criteria_verification.evidence: _default_ambient_tool_factory(config, available_capabilities) returns a closure that lazily imports jarvis.tools.assemble_tool_list and calls it with include_frontier=False. The closure is attached to the compiled graph as graph._jarvis_ambient_tool_factory whenever ambient_tool_factory=None. Asserted by TestAC004AmbientFactoryDefault.test_default_factory_is_attached_when_none, test_default_factory_invokes_assemble_tool_list_without_frontier (patches jarvis.tools.assemble_tool_list and asserts kwargs['include_frontier'] is False), and test_default_factory_returns_real_ambient_list_excluding_frontier (end-to-end: invokes the real factory, asserts 'escalate_to_frontier' ∉ names AND the FEAT-J002 9-tool baseline ⊆ names).

issues.description:
Advisory (non-blocking): task-work produced a report with 2 of 3 expected agent invocations. Missing phases: 3 (Implementation). Consider invoking these agents via the Task tool to strengthen stack-specific quality:
- Phase 3: `the stack-specific Phase-3 specialist` (Implementation)
No seam tests detected for cross-boundary feature. Consider adding seam/contract/boundary tests to validate technology boundary interactions. This is a recommendation, not a blocking gate.
BDD oracle: 1 scenario(s) reference step definitions that are not yet implemented. These do NOT block approval but should be implemented to make the scenarios runnable.
pending_examples: test_building_the_supervisor_without_async_subagents_preserves_existing_behaviour — implement: All traceback entries are hidden. Pass `--full-trace` to see hidden and internal frames.
